tools.name: movscript_list_models
tools.description: List the current enabled models for a capability or feature, including supported parameters, so the agent can pick a valid model and ask the user for only the missing fields.

tools.name: movscript_create_generation_job
tools.description: Create an AI image or video generation job through MovScript and return the generated output resource for review.

tools.name: movscript_get_generation_job
tools.description: Inspect one AI image or video generation job and return its current status, progress hints, output resource, and media preview data when available.

tools.name: movscript_list_generation_jobs
tools.description: List recent AI image or video generation jobs for the current project so the agent can monitor queued and running work.

tools.name: movscript_cancel_generation_job
tools.description: Cancel a running video generation job through MovScript. This is a write action and should only run after explicit user approval.
